Notes: Delete the zone apex name in a single UPDATE and then query the apex for SOA/NS survival or refusal behavior.

Steps.Description: Delete the apex name campus.edu. with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex SOA remains, is removed, or the server refuses the update state change.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex NS remains, is removed, or the server refuses the update state change.
